name: MikroTik Power Adapter 24V 1.2A - UK plug
title: MikroTik Power Adapter 24V 1.2A - UK plug
short_description: 24V 1.2A power supply with right angle plug. Input: 110-240V AC 50/60Hz, Output: 24V DC 1.2A, UK plug
description: The MikroTik Power Adapter 24V 1.2A (SAW30-240-1200GR2A-UK) is a reliable and efficient power supply designed to provide consistent performance for a wide range of MikroTik devices. The SAW30-240-1200GR2A-UK model comes with a standard UK plug, making it fully compatible with outlets used in the United Kingdom and other regions with the same plug type. Featuring a right-angle plug, it ensures convenient and space-saving installation, allowing your networking equipment to fit neatly in tight or compact setups. The adapter supports a wide input range of 110-240V AC at 50/60Hz, making it compatible with electrical systems in most regions worldwide. It delivers a stable 24V DC output at 1.2A, providing sufficient power for your devices to operate smoothly and efficiently. Its robust construction guarantees long-lasting reliability, even under continuous operation, making it an ideal choice for both home and professional networking environments. Whether you are powering routers, switches, or other MikroTik hardware, this adapter offers a safe, dependable, and practical solution for keeping your network running without interruption.
